title: Panmorphia peroupavae
taxonomy: Panmorphia peroupavae is a species of flowering plant in the family Burmanniaceae. It is native to Brazil and belongs to the genus Panmorphia. The classification of this plant includes its kingdom as Plantae and its phylum as Magnoliophyta. Additionally, its class is Liliopsida and its order is Burmanniales. The family classification of Panmorphia peroupavae is Burmanniaceae.
